name: Customer Lifetime Value (LTV)
description: Calculates customer lifetime value using cohort analysis and predictive metrics. Segments customers by acquisition cohort and tracks average order value, purchase frequency, and retention to estimate total customer value. Essential for CAC payback analysis and determining sustainable acquisition costs.
sql_template:
WITH customer_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id AS customer_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', c.created_at) AS acquisition_cohort,
    MIN(o.created_at) AS first_order_date,
    MAX(o.created_at) AS last_order_date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders,
    SUM(o.total_price) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(o.total_price) AS avg_order_value,
    DATEDIFF('day', MIN(o.created_at), MAX(o.created_at)) + 1 AS customer_lifetime_days
  FROM customers c
  LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id AND o.financial_status = 'paid'
  WHERE c.created_at >= '{{start_date}}'
    AND c.created_at < '{{end_date}}'
  GROUP BY c.id, acquisition_cohort
),
cohort_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    acquisition_cohort,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS cohort_size,
    AVG(total_orders) AS avg_orders_per_customer,
    AVG(total_revenue) AS avg_revenue_per_customer,
    AVG(avg_order_value) AS avg_order_value,
    AVG(customer_lifetime_days) AS avg_lifetime_days,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_revenue) AS median_revenue,
    SUM(total_revenue) AS cohort_total_revenue
  FROM customer_metrics
  GROUP BY acquisition_cohort
)
SELECT 
  acquisition_cohort,
  cohort_size,
  ROUND(avg_orders_per_customer, 2) AS avg_orders,
  ROUND(avg_revenue_per_customer, 2) AS ltv,
  ROUND(avg_order_value, 2) AS aov,
  ROUND(avg_lifetime_days, 0) AS avg_lifetime_days,
  ROUND(median_revenue, 2) AS median_ltv,
  ROUND(cohort_total_revenue, 2) AS cohort_revenue,
  ROUND(365.0 * avg_orders_per_customer / NULLIF(avg_lifetime_days, 0), 2) AS annual_order_frequency
FROM cohort_stats
ORDER BY acquisition_cohort DESC
LIMIT {{limit}}

parameters.name: limit
parameters.label: Number of Cohorts
parameters.description: How many monthly cohorts to analyze

author: Sery Team
example_output:
Returns a table with columns:
- `acquisition_cohort`: Month customers were acquired (YYYY-MM-01)
- `cohort_size`: Number of customers in this cohort
- `avg_orders`: Average orders per customer
- `ltv`: Average customer lifetime value (total revenue)
- `aov`: Average order value
- `avg_lifetime_days`: Average days from first to last order
- `median_ltv`: Median customer value (less sensitive to outliers)
- `cohort_revenue`: Total revenue from this cohort
- `annual_order_frequency`: Estimated orders per year
